description: IMS execution state machine and surface lifecycle states. Activation Surface reads this to track and validate surface progression.

ims_states.description: Canonical execution state machine — IMS Layer 1

states.label: Idle
states.description: System is ready and awaiting input

states.label: Validating
states.description: Input is being validated against UXC contracts

states.label: Failed
states.description: Execution failed — operator must be informed of reason

surface_lifecycle_states.description: Surface lifecycle state machine — governs all surfaces through the Activation Surface control plane

states.label: Brief Created
states.description: UXC Brief has been created. Surface type, CBC slot, UIS theme, and mode declared.
states.gate: UXC Brief Template must be complete

states.label: Canon Checked
states.description: Surface brief validated against UXC contracts and registries.
states.gate: All UXC contract requirements must pass validation

states.label: Build Ready
states.description: Surface is cleared for Claude-first build. UXC Brief locked.
states.gate: canon_checked must be complete. DRJ approval for Tier 3A.

states.label: In Build
states.description: Claude-first build in progress. Inline iteration phase.

states.label: UAT Active
states.description: Surface deployed to UAT relay. Stakeholder testing phase.

states.label: UAT Passed
states.description: All UAT criteria confirmed by stakeholder.
states.gate: All UAT criteria must have explicit PASS confirmation

states.label: DRJ Locked
states.description: DRJ has locked the surface. No further changes without DRJ ruling.

states.label: Archived
states.description: Surface committed to stardance-uxc-canon/surfaces/approved/. Preserved canonical state.
